question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately wrote the full solution with no engagement of the user at any decision point (multi-digit counts, empty string handling, error semantics) — all classic teachable moments for RLE were skipped.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The Pair acknowledges interesting forks (multi-digit counts, malformed input) only post-hoc in 'Design notes', rather than surfacing them as decisions for the user.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there is no questioning sequence. The entire solution and explanation are dumped in a single turn, violating the project's core didactic two-option premise.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized, but there is no back-and-forth — it's a monologue. The user's 'reply' in turn 2 is essentially a restatement, indicating no genuine conversational engagement occurred.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
